sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_float AS SELECT toFloat32OrDefault('15.3', CAST('0', 'Float32')) AS float_val;
UPDATE test_float SET float_val = toFloat32OrDefault('3.14', CAST('0', 'Float32')) WHERE float_val = 0;
SELECT float_val, toFloat32OrDefault('0x1A', CAST('0', 'Float32')) AS hex_converted FROM test_float;
